title: Monna Vanna
writer: Olga Alsen, Niccolò Machiavelli, Maurice Maeterlinck
actors: Lee Parry, Paul Wegener, Hans Stürm
plot: Guido Gurlino, head of the Pisan army, wants the Florentine Maddalena Pazzi, but she rejects him, in love with Vitelli, head of the Florentine armies. Gurlino then kidnaps young Giovanna and makes her his wife. When, during a duel...
